decisions.reasoning: Incineroar is a bulky pivot that threatens Tornadus with Flare Blitz; U-turn allows me to deal chip damage while maintaining momentum and bringing in a more favorable matchup against Incineroar.
Incineroar will likely try to pivot or chip me; U-turn allows me to maintain momentum and bring in a more favorable matchup while scouting their switch-in.
Flutter Mane is at 4% HP and will be OHKOed by Incineroar's Flare Blitz. Switching to Tornadus-Therian provides a safe pivot to preserve the turn and scout the opponent's next move.

Tornadus-Therian is at 50% HP and faces a 2HKO from Flare Blitz, while Hurricane only 3HKOs Incineroar. Switching to Calyrex-Ice preserves Tornadus for a potential Regenerator heal later and brings in a bulkier threat that can handle Incineroar's attacks better.
High Horsepower is a 2HKO and deals significant damage to Incineroar. Since I am at 41% and Incineroar is at 36%, I need to prioritize the KO before Incineroar can finish me off with Flare Blitz.
Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Tornadus-Therian is the safest pivot to handle Incineroar's potential Flare Blitz or U-turn while maintaining momentum.
I outspeed Incineroar and Hurricane is a guaranteed 2HKO given their current 47% HP. Attacking is the optimal play to remove the threat before they can land a Flare Blitz.

Tornadus-Therian is at 33% HP and will be outsped and KO'd by Flutter Mane's Moonblast. Switching to Incineroar allows me to Intimidate the Flutter Mane and preserve Tornadus for a potential Regenerator recovery later.
My Flutter Mane has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Incineroar is the best pivot to handle the opponent's Flutter Mane due to its bulk and ability to threaten with Knock Off or U-turn.

Tornadus-Therian is slower than Flutter Mane and will be 2HKOed by Moonblast, while Hurricane is only a 3HKO. Switching to Incineroar allows me to tank the special attack and potentially use Intimidate or Knock Off to disrupt the opponent.

Tornadus-Therian is at 16% and will be KO'd by any of Flutter Mane's attacks. Switching to Incineroar allows me to use Intimidate to soften the Flutter Mane and preserve Tornadus for a potential Regenerator recovery later if needed.
